pages.text:
¡AFFAIRES EIFANGER

517 1V32951

CD.18637/4/51.

Conventis sur ls appositions

TEETAKIE：

~ BRITISH EMBASSY

PAKIS.

SERVICE D'ACTION 5.IS JE

13th April, 1951,

ALETRANGER

20AVR 13511

IRC

ARRIVEE

Monsieur le Président,

I have the honour on instructions from Hig

Majesty' a Principal Secretary

of State for Foreign Affairs

to refer to the Ambassador's letter of the 1st September, 1949, in which he notified Your Excellency of the

acoession

His Majesty's Government in the United Kingdom of Great

Britain and Northern Ireland to the International Convention relating to Exhibitions,

the lind

November, 1928, and to the protocol signed at Paris on the 10th May, 1948, amending the Convention.

I have the honour to notify to Your Excellency the desire of His Majesty's Government in the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland that the provisions of this Convention as amended by the protocol of 1948 should be extended to Cyprus and Jamaica.

of Article 34 of the Convention.

I have the honour to request that I may be inf'orned in due course of the date of the receipt of this communication by the french Government.

I have the honour to be, with the highest consideration,

Monsieur le président,

Your Excellency's most obedient, humble Servant,

Son Excellence Monsieur le Président Robert Schuman,

Ministère des Affaires "trangères,
